title: crepis bodinieri
intro: Crepis bodinieri is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting liver and kidney function. Crepis bodinieri is often prepared as an infusion, decoction, or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of a cream or ointment.
